## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue)

## Testing

- [ ] Ran `cargo test`
- [ ] Ran `cargo fmt` and `npm run lint`

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-reviewed my code
- [ ] Commented complex code sections
- [ ] Updated documentation
- [ ] No new warnings
- [ ] Added tests for new features
